question: How often do I play tennis with my friends at the local park previously? How often do I play now?
ground_truth_answer: Previously, you play tennis with your friends at the local park every week (on Sunday). Currently, you play tennis every other week (on Sunday).

User plans a 5-mile jog near home in zip code 95123, followed by a tennis game with friends at the local park on Sunday, repeating every other week.

User has chosen the Almaden Lake Park Loop for the jog and plans to visit CorePower Yoga Almaden afterward to stretch and relax.
